summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of KYPAU Portfolio (cyberpunk portfolio for Muhammad Dzaky Fauzan). All backend APIs (22/22) passed. Frontend public site and admin dashboard fully functional. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/portfolio returns correct profile (MUHAMMAD DZAKY FAUZAN), 15 skills, 4 projects, 10 achievements, 9 certifications, 4 experiences, bug_bounty with 7 severity_distribution items
Backend: POST /api/contact stores message with success:true and message 'Secure message transmitted.'
Backend: POST /api/contact with invalid email returns 422
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/Kypau@2025 returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: Protected routes return 401 without token, 200 with Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns all required fields (total_views, unread_messages, vulnerabilities_found, project_clicks, recent_messages)
Backend: GET /api/admin/messages returns message list
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/messages/{id}/read marks message as read
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/messages/{id} deletes message
Backend: POST /api/analytics/track increments views
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics returns daily_views and top_pages
Backend: Content CRUD - POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/content/projects all work correctly
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns profile settings
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings updates settings
Backend: GET /api/github/repos returns {repos:[...], count:8} from live GitHub API for kypau-org
Backend: GET /api/github/org returns organization data
Backend: GET /api/github/events returns events data
Backend: GET /api/resume returns PDF (application/pdf, 4023 bytes)
Frontend: Public portfolio loads (cinematic loader completes)
Frontend: Projects section displays 4 project cards
Frontend: Clicking project card opens modal with details, tech stack, features, and links
Frontend: Project modal closes successfully
Frontend: Skills section displays skill category tabs (14 tabs found)
Frontend: Certifications carousel displays with prev/next navigation buttons
Frontend: Contact terminal input found and 'connect' command reveals form
Frontend: Contact form accepts input (name, email, message)
Frontend: Contact form submission shows success message 'Secure message transmitted.'
Frontend: Admin login page loads with correct form elements
Frontend: Admin login with admin/Kypau@2025 redirects to /admin/dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard displays stat cards (28 views, 2 messages, 50 vulnerabilities, 1 project click)
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows traffic chart and recent messages
Frontend: All admin sidebar navigation links present (Overview, Inbox, Projects, Certifications, Achievements, Skills, Media Library, Analytics, Settings, Activity Logs)
Frontend: Admin Inbox displays message table with submitted contact form message visible
Frontend: Admin Projects manager loads and 'Add New' button opens editor drawer
